cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE ON)

# The React Native gradle plugin uses the codegen name of the library
# (`codegenConfig.name` in package.json = `SheetViewSpec`) as the build-target
# stem and expects a library target called `react_codegen_SheetViewSpec`.
# Our custom CMakeLists replaces the auto-generated one so we can compile
# our custom C++ sources alongside the codegen-produced files AND put our
# `jni/` directory earlier in the include path (this shadows the default
# `<SheetViewSpec.h>` and `<react/renderer/components/SheetViewSpec/...>`
# headers generated by codegen when they would otherwise pull in the
# default-typedef ShadowNode).
set(LIB_LITERAL SheetViewSpec)
set(LIB_TARGET_NAME react_codegen_${LIB_LITERAL})

set(LIB_ANDROID_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../..)
set(LIB_CUSTOM_CPP_DIR ${LIB_ANDROID_DIR}/src/main/cpp)
set(LIB_CUSTOM_COMPONENTS_DIR
    ${LIB_CUSTOM_CPP_DIR}/react/renderer/components/${LIB_LITERAL})
set(LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_JNI_DIR
    ${LIB_ANDROID_DIR}/build/generated/source/codegen/jni)
set(LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_COMPONENTS_DIR
    ${LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_JNI_DIR}/react/renderer/components/${LIB_LITERAL})

add_compile_options(
  -fexceptions
  -frtti
  -std=c++20
  -Wall
  -Wpedantic
  -Wno-gnu-zero-variadic-macro-arguments
)

file(GLOB LIB_CUSTOM_SRCS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp
  ${LIB_CUSTOM_COMPONENTS_DIR}/*.cpp
)

file(GLOB LIB_CODEGEN_SRCS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
  ${LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_JNI_DIR}/*.cpp
  ${LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_COMPONENTS_DIR}/*.cpp
)

add_library(
  ${LIB_TARGET_NAME}
  SHARED
  ${LIB_CUSTOM_SRCS}
  ${LIB_CODEGEN_SRCS}
)

# Order matters: our `jni` and `cpp` dirs must come BEFORE the codegen
# generated directory so our custom `SheetViewSpec.h` shadows the generated
# one and our custom component-descriptor include path wins.
target_include_directories(
  ${LIB_TARGET_NAME}
  PUBLIC
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
  ${LIB_CUSTOM_CPP_DIR}
  ${LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_JNI_DIR}
  ${LIB_ANDROID_GENERATED_COMPONENTS_DIR}
)

target_link_libraries(
  ${LIB_TARGET_NAME}
  ReactAndroid::reactnative
  ReactAndroid::jsi
  fbjni::fbjni
)

if(COMMAND target_compile_reactnative_options)
  target_compile_reactnative_options(${LIB_TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE)
endif()
